task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The correct project file is loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre window displays the loaded project, with tasks visible in the spreadsheet view and 'current_task' or the project name in the title bar.

task_completion.description: The 'Obtain building permits' task is located
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task list shows row 7 with the name 'Obtain building permits', located under the 'General Conditions' summary task.

task_completion.description: The duration of the task is updated to 6 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Duration' cell for the 'Obtain building permits' task (row 7) shows '6 days' or '6d'. The Gantt chart bar for this task may also visibly extend.

task_completion.description: The project is saved after the modification
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' icon (floppy disk) in the toolbar, uses the File -> Save menu, or presses Ctrl+S. Look for the save button being highlighted or the save action occurring.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to modify the project
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the ProjectLibre graphical user interface to change the duration, rather than using a terminal command or text editor to edit the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual ProjectLibre application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine ProjectLibre application being used, identifiable by its standard layout, menus, and Gantt chart interface.

integrity.description: No unrelated tasks or settings were modified
integrity.visual_evidence: Only the duration of the 'Obtain building permits' task was changed. Other tasks' names, durations, and dependencies remain untouched.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target task is 'Obtain building permits' (UID 7, row 7). The original duration was 32 hours (4 days based on an 8-hour workday). The new duration must be updated to 6 days (48 hours). The project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml.
